overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character walking along an elevated rooftop walkway in a gothic-inspired city at night. The scene features neon signage, a large full moon, and transitions from dry to rainy conditions while maintaining a dark, atmospheric tone.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop walkway between gothic skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily along the elevated metal walkway, cape flowing behind him, overlooking the neon-lit city below

entered.detail: narrow metal platform with iron railings suspended high above the city streets
ornate stone building with pointed spires and arched windows illuminated by exterior lights
tall slender tower with clock face visible against the night sky
large orange neon sign reading PARKING attached to the building facade
illuminated advertising screens on distant buildings showing various images
thick support cables stretching across the gap between buildings

segments.scene_description: Batman traverses a narrow elevated walkway high above Gotham City at night. The path is flanked by ornate gothic architecture on the right featuring a prominent neon parking sign, while illuminated billboards glow in the distance on the left. The full moon illuminates the scene from above as the character moves steadily forward toward a distant clock tower.

events.description: rain begins to fall, creating visible streaks and wet reflective surfaces on the walkway

agents.ego_description: Batman continuing along the walkway as rain begins to fall, maintaining steady pace toward the clock tower

segments.scene_description: The weather shifts as rain begins to fall on the elevated walkway, creating streaks visible against the dark sky and reflecting off the metal surface. Batman continues his steady advance as the neon parking sign passes out of view behind him, while the gothic architecture and distant clock tower remain visible through the increasing precipitation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a high rooftop walkway that transitions from a clear, moonlit night into a sudden downpour. It begins with Batman traversing a narrow path flanked by ornate gothic architecture and a glowing neon parking sign, while illuminated billboards shimmer in the distance. As the character moves steadily toward a distant clock tower under the light of a full moon, the atmosphere shifts and rain begins to fall. The scene then evolves as streaks of precipitation blur the dark sky and create reflections across the metal walkway, with the neon signage fading from view as the rain intensifies.
